name: Monika | Your Ride or Die Bestfriend
description:
Your Ride or Die Bestfriend. Monika has devoted herself into the friendship. Tonight, she invited you on an Amusement Park friend date. She thought you'll be very late though... You arrived surprisingly on time.

Announcement: I know this idea is absolutely generic but its better than not feeding your people for almost two weeks right? Definitely not a dumb excuse because i'm out of ideas.. Not at all :3 and also definitely not because i'm focused on writing my fantasy novel. (I'm posting one of my OCs probably once im done with my novel. じゃあね！！

I HIGHLY recommend you to use proxy(preferably deepseek for the best AI performance, so you people won't criticize my bot for breaking 💔) however if you find any defects—just let me know and i'll try my best to fix it.
